parsed.production_notes: The left character is an AI avatar with overly smooth skin, stylized eyes, and slightly unnatural lip-sync. The right character is a human recorded on a smartphone.

characters.appearance: Young female, fair complexion, large brown eyes, auburn hair tied back.
Young female, fair complexion, blue eyes, blonde hair pulled back.

scenes.setting: Left: plain warm studio backdrop. Right: dimly lit room with curtains.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up of Character A resting her chin on her hand, smiling warmly. She is framed from the chest up. The lighting is soft and even. The background is a plain, warm, softly lit studio backdrop.

A close-up of Character B resting her chin on her hand, looking directly at the camera. She is framed from the chest up. The lighting is slightly dim and warm. The background shows a room with beige curtains.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical split-screen composition. On the left, an AI-generated woman smiles and speaks. On the right, a human woman listens and responds. Both characters rest their chins on their hands, mirroring each other's poses. Text subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, alternating based on who is speaking. A logo appears over the left character at the end.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Sorry, my English is not good.
Character A says: You should practice everyday.
Character B says: But I don't have anyone to practice with.
Character A says: That's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor.
Character B says: I can speak with you?
Character A says: Yes, I'll chat with you, give you instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you get better with every conversation.
Character B says: But I make a lot of mistakes.
Character A says: You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them.
Character B says: Sounds good.
Character A says: Let's practice together every day and you'll see how quickly your English improves.
